keyEvents.text: Goal! France 0, England 1. Declan Rice (England) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! France 0, England 2. Ezri Konsa (England) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross following a corner.
Goal! France 0, England 3. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Marcus Rashford following a fast break.
Goal! France 0, England 4. Bukayo Saka (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Eberechi Eze with a through ball.
Substitution, France. Ousmane Dembélé replaces Rayan Cherki.
Substitution, France. Bradley Barcola replaces Désiré Doué.
Substitution, France. Lucas Digne replaces Théo Hernández.
Substitution, France. Dayot Upamecano replaces Ibrahima Konaté.
Substitution, England. Ollie Watkins replaces Marcus Rashford.
Goal! France 1, England 4. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball following a fast break.
Goal! France 2, England 4. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kylian Mbappé with a through ball.
Goal! France 3, England 4. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Olise.
Substitution, England. Elliot Anderson replaces Ivan Toney.
Substitution, England. Jude Bellingham replaces Eberechi Eze.
Substitution, England. Reece James replaces Jarell Quansah because of an injury.
Goal! France 3, England 5. Bukayo Saka (England) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, France. Jules Koundé replaces Malo Gusto because of an injury.
Substitution, England. Trevoh Chalobah replaces Marc Guéhi.
Goal! France 4, England 5. Ousmane Dembélé (France) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Dayot Upamecano following a fast break.
Goal! France 4, England 6. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner following a fast break.
